topic: Hidden costs of in-house corporate event planning
hook: Your team thinks they're saving money by planning the event themselves — they're not.
script_he: הצוות שלכם חושב שהם חוסכים כסף כשהם מארגנים את האירוע לבד — הם לא. הנה מה שאף אחד לא מחשב: שעות העבודה שנגנבות מהפרויקטים האמיתיים שלהם, הטעויות של מי שעושה את זה בפעם הראשונה, והנחות הספקים שאתם פשוט לא מקבלים כי אין לכם את הנפח. אנחנו בUPE רואים את זה כל הזמן — אחרי 1,500 אירועים ב-130 יעדים, אנחנו יודעים בדיוק איפה הכסף נעלם. לפני שאתם מחליטים, תשאלו אותנו. DM ונעשה חישוב ביחד.
script_en: Your team thinks they're saving money by planning the event themselves — they're not. Here's what nobody actually calculates: the work hours pulled away from their real jobs, the rookie mistakes that cost double to fix, and the vendor rates you simply don't get without serious volume. At UPE, we see this every single time — after 1,500-plus events across 130-plus destinations, we know exactly where the budget quietly disappears. Before you decide to go in-house, DM us and let's run the real numbers together.
captions: Vendor rates you'll never get alone
1,500+ events. We know where it goes.
post_caption:
The most expensive corporate event is the one your team planned themselves. 👀 Every hour spent on logistics is an hour not spent on actual business. Every first-time mistake has a price tag. And those 'great vendor deals'? They go to whoever brings the volume. We've produced 1,500+ events across 130+ destinations — we know exactly where the hidden costs hide. Save this before your next internal planning meeting. 🔖
#CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #HRLeaders #IncentiveTravel #B2BEvents #EventROI
scene: Sofia sits across a sleek hotel lobby bar, mid-afternoon light filtering through tall windows, a half-finished espresso and a printed event budget sheet on the marble table in front of her — relaxed but sharp, like she just came out of a client debrief.
